instruction:
Repair the disturbed scenic SVG: tropical coral reef.

Patch:
- remove sv_028-extra-survey-marker
- download-sv_028-polygon-004.fill: "#ec4899" -> "#ff8c1a"
- download-sv_028-circle-001.cx: 343.0 -> 300
- download-sv_028-ellipse-002.stroke-width: 8.0 -> 3
- download-sv_028-polygon-002.opacity: 0.32 -> 0.7
initial_svg:
